meta.name: Omega
meta.title: Omega CN1500 Multi-Zone Controller
meta.description: Webcam OCR for an Omega CN1500 ramp & soak controller. The display cycles through enabled zones every few seconds; an LLM reads each frame and tags the value to the right channel based on the lit CTR-N indicator at the bottom of the screen.

llm.prompt: These frames show the front panel of an Omega CN1500 multi-zone temperature controller. The screen cycles through enabled zones, displaying one zone's value at a time for a few seconds before switching to the next. The lit-up red dot under one of the CTR labels (CTR1..CTR7 or HLD) tells you which zone the currently-displayed number belongs to. Read every distinct (CTR, value) pair you can find across all frames and return them as a JSON object keyed by zone name (ctr1..ctr7) with the displayed numeric value (Celsius). Use null for any zone that does not appear in any frame.
llm.example_prompt: These frames show the front panel of an Omega CN1500 multi-zone temperature controller. The screen cycles through enabled zones, displaying one zone's value at a time for a few seconds before switching to the next. The lit-up red dot under one of the CTR labels (CTR1..CTR7 or HLD) tells you which zone the currently-displayed number belongs to. Read every distinct (CTR, value) pair you can find across all frames and return them as a JSON object keyed by zone name (ctr1..ctr7) with the displayed numeric value (Celsius). Use null for any zone that does not appear in any frame.
